scan_log.stable_rendered:
THE ELEMENTS

01 - BREATH

Your nervous system's master switch. We teach coherent breathing, box breath, and tummo techniques that recalibrate stress response at the cellular level.

02 - MOVE

Somatic flow sequences drawn from yoga, animal locomotion, and primal movement patterns. Designed for the modern body stuck in static postures all day.

03 - COLD

Deliberate cold exposure protocols using ice baths, cold showers, and outdoor immersion to spike dopamine, reduce inflammation, and build mental resilience.

04 - NOURISH

Seasonal, plant-forward nutrition that feeds the microbiome and aligns eating patterns with circadian rhythms. Food as the foundation, not an afterthought.

ELEMENTAL WELLNESS FLOW - EST. 2024

FIND
YOUR
FLOW.

A whole-body practice rooted in breath, movement, and the ancient intelligence of nature. We strip wellness back to its elements.

BEGIN PRACTICE →

THE PRACTICE

Ancient wisdom.
Modern body.

We fuse breathwork, somatic movement, cold exposure, and regenerative nutrition into one coherent daily practice. No gimmicks. No shortcuts. Just the elements.

94%

REPORT REDUCED ANXIETY WITHIN 30 DAYS

12K

PRACTITIONERS ACROSS 40 COUNTRIES

4

CORE ELEMENTS: BREATH . MOVE . COLD . NOURISH

THE ELEMENTS

01 - BREATH

Your nervous system's master switch. We teach coherent breathing, box breath, and tummo techniques that recalibrate stress response at the cellular level.

02 - MOVE

Somatic flow sequences drawn from yoga, animal locomotion, and primal movement patterns. Designed for the modern body stuck in static postures all day.

03 - COLD

Deliberate cold exposure protocols using ice baths, cold showers, and outdoor immersion to spike dopamine, reduce inflammation, and build mental resilience.

04 - NOURISH

Seasonal, plant-forward nutrition that feeds the microbiome and aligns eating patterns with circadian rhythms. Food as the foundation, not an afterthought.

Start your
30-day
reset.

Join 12,000 practitioners and experience all four elements in a structured daily practice. First week is completely free. No card required.

CLAIM FREE WEEK →

FROM THE FIELD

"Three weeks in and I feel like a completely different person. The cold protocol alone changed everything."

MARA SOLIS

Practitioner since Jan 2024 - Oslo, Norway
